sql:
SELECT  COALESCE(SUM(TRANS_PERF_CNT), 0)AS TRANS_PERF_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(TRANS_ALARM_CNT), 0)AS TRANS_ALARM_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(IP_RESOURCE_CNT), 0)AS IP_RESOURCE_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(IP_ALARM_CNT), 0)AS IP_ALARM_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(IP_PERF_CNT), 0)AS IP_PERF_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(IP_SFLOW_CNT), 0)AS IP_SFLOW_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(TICKET_RT_CNT), 0)AS TICKET_RT_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(TICKET_ATT_CNT), 0)AS TICKET_ATT_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(TICKET_NTT_CNT), 0)AS TICKET_NTT_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(TICKET_PF_CNT), 0)AS TICKET_PF_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(LINK_TOTAL_RESOURCE_CNT), 0) AS LINK_TOTAL_RESOURCE_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(LINK_TOTAL_ALARM_CNT), 0) AS LINK_TOTAL_ALARM_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(LINK_IP_PERF_CNT), 0) AS LINK_IP_PERF_CNT,
                COALESCE(SUM(LINK_TRANS_PERF_CNT), 0) AS LINK_TRANS_PERF_CNT
        FROM    nia.tb_opsts
        WHERE 1=1
            AND OPSTS_TIME   =   '2024-11-09'
            AND OPSTS_GB   =   'DAY'
